title: Modpack for content makers
description: Modpack for content makers, with good mods for optimization of your videos and your pc.
body: Mods for optimization and for making video for youtube. Replay mod for peplay of your world. Borderless mining for fullscreen record in OBS. Emotecraft for do more dynamic in video. Fabrishot for making 4K screenshots. Isometric renders for do renders of minecraft items, mobs and litematica. Litematica for do buildings. I hope you like it!
